title: 1.1: Identifies the reducer location where lastActionRequiresLogin state is managed (e.g., client/state/reader-ui/reducer.js)
1.2: Identifies that the pending action reducer lacks a persistence wrapper (e.g., lastActionRequiresLogin has no withPersistence unlike lastPath)
1.3: Identifies page reload in the login success callback as the moment Redux state is cleared (e.g., window.location.reload() in onLoginSuccess)
1.4: Traces the like button registration path where logged-out clicks dispatch the pending action (e.g., handleLikeToggle calling registerLastActionRequiresLogin when !isLoggedIn)
1.5: Identifies absence of replay handler logic after authentication (e.g., ReaderMain component has no code to check for or dispatch pending actions)
1.7: Identifies auth dialog onClose clears pending action (e.g., clearLastActionRequiresLogin())
1.8: Explains why the issue is not timing-dependent or initialization-order-dependent (e.g., state exists until reload, no race condition involved)
